# PR: ICTRecht/Legal-GenAI-Resources

## Category

Add under: `### Tools & Integrations` or `### MCP Servers`

## PR Title

`feat: add ComplianceStack — MCP server for AI regulatory compliance auditing`

## PR Body

```markdown
### What

[ComplianceStack](https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack) is an open-source MCP server that provides automated compliance auditing for AI systems against 5 regulatory frameworks:

- **EU AI Act** (Reg. 2024/1689)
- **GDPR** (Reg. 2016/679)
- **NIST AI RMF** (AI 100-1)
- **ISO/IEC 42001:2023**
- **India DPDP Act 2023**

### Why it fits this list

- **Legal compliance focus** — Automates the regulatory checks that legal teams and compliance officers need
- **DPIA generation** — GDPR Art. 35 compliance out of the box
- **ROPA generation** — GDPR Art. 30 records of processing activities
- **EU AI Act risk classification** — Art. 6 risk tier assignment with rationale
- **W3C Verifiable Credentials** — Cryptographically signed audit certificates for legal evidence
- **Zero data egress** — Critical for law firms handling confidential client data

### Install

```bash
npx compliance-stack-mcp-server
```

### Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/compliance-stack-mcp-server)
```
